productPageReviews.reviewDescription: I’ve been really enjoying this nonogram puzzle book. The puzzles are fun, engaging, and just the right level of challenging. It’s a great way to relax while still keeping your brain active. The layouts are clear and easy to follow, which makes the whole experience even better. Definitely recommended for anyone who enjoys logic puzzles!

productPageReviews.reviewDescription: This nonogram book by Pizzless is an excellent option for both beginners and those who already enjoy this type of puzzle. productPageReviews.reviewDescription: This puzzle book completely exceeded my expectations. The challenges are brilliantly designed: some quick warm‑ups and others that really make you think. productPageReviewsFromOtherCountries.reviewDescription: Este libro de nonogramas en inglés es perfecto para desconectar y disfrutar un rato cada día. Los puzzles están muy bien diseñados: empiezan sencillos y suben de nivel, así que nunca aburren. Además, las instrucciones en inglés son claras y fáciles de seguir, ideal si quieres practicar el idioma mientras te diviertes. El formato es cómodo y las soluciones ayudan cuando te atascas. Es una opción estupenda tanto para principiantes como para quienes buscan un nuevo reto. ¡Un libro entretenido, relajante y muy recomendable que engancha desde el primer puzzle!
The grid lines are not very clear.

This book lives up to expectations. The puzzles are very well made, and I really like the clean design, the paper quality, and the variety of designs, which makes working with the book a pleasure. For its price, this book is a good choice.
Un libro muy entretenido, que tiene una breve introducción, y lo puedes comenzar por niveles, de más fácil a más difícil, para ir cogiendo soltura.Gran producto, que te mantiene la mente activa!

productPageReviewsFromOtherCountries.reviewTitle: Love it! Solving it feels very rewarding
productPageReviewsFromOtherCountries.reviewDescription: Good format and larger than expected, indeed. I find some designs common at the start, but as you progress they get better and harder, which is nice to see. I give it 5 stars because I like the combination of challenge and creativity and the pacing of the difficulty is good.

productPageReviews.reviewDescription: This is my first time doing nonograms, and I really liked them. At first, it’s hard to grasp the logic, but the book helps a lot. Plus, the grids are clear, which makes it much easier to follow the puzzle without getting confused.

productPageReviews.reviewTitle: You can really feel the progression
productPageReviews.reviewDescription: One of the things I liked most is how the difficulty is structured. You start with more accessible puzzles, and the level gradually increases. It keeps you from getting frustrated and makes you want to keep going.
productPageReviews.reviewedIn: Reviewed in the United States on April 18, 2026

productPageReviewsFromOtherCountries.reviewDescription: I got the first book from this same publisher and liked it enough to try this one. Good decision. The grid still good and designs feel more ambitious. Still the same tip I gave before: use pencil, not marker. The paper handles it well and on the bigger grids you'll definitely want to erase. The progression is real and the images that appear are often unexpected. Happy to see more books of this publisher

productPageReviewsFromOtherCountries.reviewTitle: My second book from this series and still hooked :D
productPageReviewsFromOtherCountries.reviewDescription: The first one became part of my morning routine and this one has picked up right where it left off. When the image reveals itself after a hard grid the feeling doesn't get old. I love the design of the Roman chariot, it turned out beautifully. I don't regret buying these books, and I think the price is very good too.

productPageReviewsFromOtherCountries.reviewTitle: Good for the commute and weekends both
productPageReviewsFromOtherCountries.reviewDescription: Smaller grids take 10–15 minutes, perfect for the train. Lots of variety like animals, architecture, symbols, nothing repeated so far and thats good for me. The grid lines are crisp and easy to follow, and that's something you really appreciate in this type of book. Consistent quality throughout.

I'm not usually a puzzle person but this book is a great entry point. I like the designs and when you finish a puzzle the image that appears is genuinely satisfying. Grids are clean and easy to work with. Already halfway through the medium section.

I can tell that this are not random pixel art, i like the effort of try to make different designs. Some of the harder ones take longer than expected, but that's a good thing if you want a real challenge. Well organized, good variety. Recommended.

raw_products.bookDescription:
Clues for the puzzle shapes are given in a separate sheet. Plus, the answers to all the puzzles are included at the end of the book.What are the basics of Nonogram Puzzles and how to solve them?
Nonogram Puzzles also known as Hanjie, Griddlers, hanjie, Paint by Numbers, Pic-a-Pix, and many other names...
Nonogram Puzzles also known as Hanjie, Griddlers, hanjie, Paint by Numbers, Pic-a-Pix, and many other names...
It is a visual logic grid puzzle that starts with an empty grid and numbers on rows and columns.
It is a visual logic grid puzzle that starts with an empty grid and numbers on rows and columns.
The numbers represent the shaded small squares or tiles in a given direction consecutively.
The numbers represent the shaded small squares or tiles in a given direction consecutively.
If there is a set of numbers, e.g. 1 2 5 then that means there are 3 sets of shaded tiles; the first set has one shaded tile, the second has two shaded tiles and the third set has 5 shaded tiles. And there MUST be at least one empty tile between the sets.
If there is a set of numbers, e.g. 1 2 5 then that means there are 3 sets of shaded tiles; the first set has one shaded tile, the second has two shaded tiles and the third set has 5 shaded tiles. And there MUST be at least one empty tile between the sets.
More instructions are given inside the book along with instructions pages.
More instructions are given inside the book along with instructions pages.

Size: 8.5 x 11 inch with softcover and paperback binding.
Size: 8.5 x 11 inch with softcover and paperback binding.
Pages: 50 pages with more than 30 different puzzles (one per page) and the solutions of all the puzzles at the end.

productPageReviewsFromOtherCountries.reviewedIn: Reviewed in the United Kingdom on July 17, 2024

productPageReviewsFromOtherCountries.reviewDescription: It is a book of nonograms so have to give it a couple of stars but...It feels like one of those books that you can send of and print yourself. The instructions are for a windows nonogram app, including screenshots, and talk about clicking buttons, toggling options and a database. All written in poorly translated English.The nonograms themselves all include the text "made with the LogTek Puzzle Maker". As if someone has generated these online and stuck them in a book. Most have large empty borders, meaning that a lot of the space is wasted. Flicking through the solutions reveals some questionable shapes!This book feels like someone has chucked together some stuff on their Windows 2000 machine and turned it into a book. I would not recommend it to anyone.
productPageReviewsFromOtherCountries.reviewedIn: Reviewed in the United Kingdom on July 6, 2025

aiReviewsSummary.text: Customers find this Nonogram puzzle book to be the best of its kind, with plenty of puzzles to solve that get progressively more complex. The QR code scanning feature receives mixed feedback, with several customers reporting that the codes are difficult to scan.

keywords.name: Content
keywords.text: Customers find the puzzle book to be decent, with one describing it as the best Nonogram book available.

partialReviews.text: As an avid fan of these puzzles, this is one of the better books i’ve come across....
This is a great collection!! Even the beginner ones are fun. And I do love that they don’t waste half of the book including the solutions....
I like the puzzles and the ease of tearing off a page but the empty rows and columns around the outside of a puzzle is seriously ANNOYING!...
...Amazing! Perfect size squares and I love all the gorgeous pictures....

keywords.name: Puzzle complexity
keywords.text: Customers enjoy the variety of puzzles in the book, with one customer noting that they get progressively more complex.

partialReviews.text: Not logic puzzles like the other nonogram books.
...The book is bound well, printed well. The puzzles are smart, and challenging. Having the QR code for the hints and answers is really clever!...
...Makes it difficult to solve harder puzzles when you’re stuck.
Nice print quality and good number of puzzles.

keywords.name: Qr code scanning
keywords.text: Customers have mixed experiences with the QR codes in the puzzle book, with some finding them difficult to scan, while one customer notes they are perfect for hints and solutions.

partialReviews.text: ...The QR codes are really difficult to scan as well. Hints aren't super helpful, they usually show the first few moves that you can figure out anyway....
partialReviews.highlightedPart: QR codes are really difficult to scan

partialReviews.text: ...no pages are wasted on clues and solutions, they're all printed in scan codes on each page. Amazing!...
partialReviews.highlightedPart: all printed in scan codes on each page

partialReviews.text: ...of puzzles to solve, but my 3 star review comes from issues with scanning some of the QR codes as well as the binding....
partialReviews.highlightedPart: issues with scanning some of the QR codes

partialReviews.text: ...A QR code to the hint and solution is perfect. Please make some more volumes!
partialReviews.highlightedPart: QR code to the hint and solution is perfect

productPageReviews.reviewDescription: This is a great collection!! Even the beginner ones are fun. And I do love that they don’t waste half of the book including the solutions. A QR code to the hint and solution is perfect. Please make some more volumes!
productPageReviews.reviewedIn: Reviewed in the United States on March 15, 2025

productPageReviews.reviewTitle: This is the best Nonogram book I’ve found!
productPageReviews.reviewDescription: I was so overwhelmed with the sheer amount of options for Nonogram books, and wow I am so happy I landed with this one! The book is bound well, printed well. The puzzles are smart, and challenging. Having the QR code for the hints and answers is really clever! And this book is THICK! I’ve only tested the waters with the easier puzzles, but WOW as you go deeper in the book, they get more and more complex! This is going to last me for a long time!
productPageReviews.reviewedIn: Reviewed in the United States on November 19, 2023

productPageReviews.reviewTitle: One of the BEST Nonogram Puzzle Books I've Purchased
productPageReviews.reviewDescription: The best part...no pages are wasted on clues and solutions, they're all printed in scan codes on each page. Amazing! Perfect size squares and I love all the gorgeous pictures. Very pleased with this book and intend to purchase Volume 1 when I finish this Volume 2.
productPageReviews.reviewedIn: Reviewed in the United States on September 19, 2024

productPageReviews.reviewDescription: I like the puzzles and the ease of tearing off a page but the empty rows and columns around the outside of a puzzle is seriously ANNOYING! There is no reason for these extra rows and columns folks. STOP THIS PLEASE!
productPageReviews.reviewedIn: Reviewed in the United States on December 13, 2024

productPageReviews.reviewDescription: As an avid fan of these puzzles, this is one of the better books i’ve come across. There’s plenty of puzzles to solve, but my 3 star review comes from issues with scanning some of the QR codes as well as the binding. Books like these are meant to be spiral bounded. Although, nothing a $15 job Staples couldn’t solve!
productPageReviews.reviewedIn: Reviewed in the United States on February 20, 2024

productPageReviews.reviewDescription: Really good nonogram book, but some of the pages are miscut, so the hint and solution QR codes are cut off, and unusable. Makes it difficult to solve harder puzzles when you’re stuck.
productPageReviews.reviewedIn: Reviewed in the United States on September 9, 2025

productPageReviews.reviewDescription: Nice print quality and good number of puzzles.
productPageReviews.reviewedIn: Reviewed in the United States on October 14, 2024

productPageReviews.reviewDescription: Only on the second puzzle and it can’t be solved with logic alone. You must use a “guesstimate” to start the puzzle or use their hint QR code.Not happy
productPageReviews.reviewedIn: Reviewed in the United States on February 24, 2026

productPageReviewsFromOtherCountries.reviewDescription: Brought this and it is massive, loads of pages, more fun to use colourful pencils.
productPageReviewsFromOtherCountries.reviewedIn: Reviewed in the United Kingdom on November 15, 2024

productPageReviewsFromOtherCountries.reviewDescription: Plenty of puzzles to keep you occupied
productPageReviewsFromOtherCountries.reviewedIn: Reviewed in the United Kingdom on February 25, 2024

raw_products.bookDescription:
100 Nonograms Multicolor puzzles (vol.1). This is the second edition with several new puzzles.
100 Nonograms Multicolor puzzles (vol.1). This is the second edition with several new puzzles.Enjoy 100 multicolor griddlers, also known as picross - number logic puzzles that reveal beautiful, colorful pictures as you solve them. The colors are carefully chosen, so you don’t need a huge variety of shades to complete each puzzle.What you will find in this book:Puzzles ranging in size from 10x10 to 35x45.Easy-to-follow instructions. Understandable even to a beginner.A complete solution guide to check your work or help you get unstuck.Refined puzzle dimensions. Equal cells size in all nonograms for a smoother solving experience.A difficulty ranking system. Helps to easily identify the challenge level of each nonogram.A supportive color palette for each nonogram. Makes clearer identification of the colors used in each puzzle."Nonograms Multicolor vol. 1" is perfect for relaxing at home, taking with you on vacation or while traveling, and also makes a wonderful gift for puzzle fans. Enjoy hours of creative fun and relaxation wherever you are!________________________________________________________________________________________________griddlers book, nonograms book, picross book, japanese crosswords, hanjie book, paint by numbers book, paintdoku book, pic-a-pix book, griddlers, nonograms, picross, hanjie, paint by numbers, paintdoku, pic-a-pix, best griddlers book, best nonograms book, best picross book, best hanjie book, best paint by numbers book, best paintdoku book, best pic-a-pix book

raw_products.author: Bad Bird

attributes.value: #86,641 in Books (See Top 100 in Books) #304 in Logic & Brain Teasers (Books)#651 in Puzzles (Books)

raw_products.bookDescription:
Discover the hidden pictures by following the numeric clues.
Nonograms (also known as Griddlers, Hanjie, Japanese Crosswords or Picross) are picture logic puzzles in which cells in a grid must be filled in or left blank based on the provided numeric hints.
The Nonograms for Everyone book is a collection of 88 nonogram puzzles suitable for beginners and experts alike.
Book features:
Original nonogram puzzle designs, created by professional graphic designers.
Original nonogram puzzle designs, created by professional graphic designers.
Includes instructions and tips on solving nonogram puzzles.
Includes instructions and tips on solving nonogram puzzles.
Includes solutions to all puzzles at the end of the book.
Includes solutions to all puzzles at the end of the book.
Each solved puzzle reveals a fun picture.
Each solved puzzle reveals a fun picture.
All puzzles can be solved with logic and without guessing.
All puzzles can be solved with logic and without guessing.
14 different sizes, ranging in difficulty from easy (5x5) to hard (25x30).
14 different sizes, ranging in difficulty from easy (5x5) to hard (25x30).

productPageReviews.reviewDescription: It says they all are able to be solved with logic, no guessing needed. But they get harder as they get bigger, which is a fun challenge! I like to work on when my little ones sit with me, or at the end of the day when we are winding down.My kids like to see what the pictures are, and try to guess as I'm solving them.
productPageReviews.reviewedIn: Reviewed in the United States on January 20, 2026

productPageReviews.reviewTitle: 1 million times better then that other book that's the most popular.
productPageReviews.reviewDescription: This one is great.  The puzzles are easy to hard but the biggest thing is they are actually fun.  Don't think just a buy.  Stay away from those expensive ones they are not fun
productPageReviews.reviewedIn: Reviewed in the United States on June 24, 2024

productPageReviews.reviewDescription: I loved this book! It was a good variety of puzzles from easy to hard. Easy to read cells. Loved the names every puzzle solution had.
productPageReviews.reviewedIn: Reviewed in the United States on June 3, 2024

productPageReviews.reviewDescription: Great book. I would highly recommend. I wish there were more like this book!
productPageReviews.reviewedIn: Reviewed in the United States on September 6, 2025

productPageReviewsFromOtherCountries.reviewDescription: I had fun on the more difficult ones, and managed to teach my boyfriend to do some of the easier ones :)
Great pictures with a range of difficulties suitable for all. Loved it x

productPageReviewsFromOtherCountries.reviewDescription: Loved this. It’s been a while I was looking for a book like this one. Nice variety of challenges. Book has a good size too, little bit smaller than A4.
